html:
AMD Advanced Micro Devices, Inc. (~354.49) NEAR ZONE

⇗ Top

Price: $354.49 | Entry Zone: $200–250

Technicals

  • The stock is currently trading above the upper diagonal trendline, indicating a strong bullish trend.
  • The RSI oscillator shows both lines are in the overbought territory (above 70), suggesting a potential pullback.
  • There are multiple 'Buy' signals visible on the chart, reinforcing the bullish sentiment.
  • The overall trend structure shows higher highs and higher lows, characteristic of an uptrend.

News & Financials

  • The stock is currently trading above the upper diagonal trendline, indicating a strong bullish trend.
  • The RSI oscillator shows both lines are in the overbought territory (above 70), suggesting a potential pullback.
  • There are multiple 'Buy' signals visible on the chart, reinforcing the bullish sentiment.
  • The overall trend structure shows higher highs and higher lows, characteristic of an uptrend.

Assessment

  • Buy level: The stock has experienced a significant run-up, and the current price of ~$354.49 is near the upper bounds of its recent trading range. A pullback to the 200-250 range would offer a more attractive entry point.
  • Risk: The RSI being in overbought territory indicates a short-term risk of a price correction. The stock's rapid ascent also increases the potential for a sharper decline if market sentiment shifts.
  • Action: Given the current overbought conditions and the stock's significant run-up, it is advisable to hold the current position. Consider trimming the position by 25% (~10.0 shares) if the price continues to extend beyond the current trendline, or wait for a pullback to a more favorable entry zone before considering adding more.

Consider trimming the position by 25% (~10.0 shares) if the price continues to extend beyond the current trendline, or wait for a pullback to a more favorable entry zone before considering adding more.

html:
AMZN Amazon.com, Inc. (~265.06) HIGH RISK

⇗ Top

Price: $265.06 | Entry Zone: $230–245

Technicals

  • Price is currently testing the upper boundary of a long-term ascending channel, indicating potential overextension.
  • RSI is in overbought territory (above 70), suggesting a high probability of a near-term pullback or consolidation.
  • The stock has experienced a sharp vertical move from the lower trendline support, leaving it extended from moving averages.
  • Buy/Sell signals have been mixed, with the recent price action showing a strong momentum push that is now hitting resistance.

News & Financials

  • Price is currently testing the upper boundary of a long-term ascending channel, indicating potential overextension.
  • RSI is in overbought territory (above 70), suggesting a high probability of a near-term pullback or consolidation.
  • The stock has experienced a sharp vertical move from the lower trendline support, leaving it extended from moving averages.
  • Buy/Sell signals have been mixed, with the recent price action showing a strong momentum push that is now hitting resistance.

Assessment

  • Buy level: Wait for a pullback toward the 230-245 range or a retest of the breakout level to improve the risk-reward ratio.
  • Risk: High risk of a mean-reversion trade as the price is hitting the upper channel resistance while RSI is overbought.
  • Action: Maintain 0% allocation and wait for a pullback; do not initiate a position at current resistance levels.
action: Maintain 0% allocation and wait for a pullback; do not initiate a position at current resistance levels.

html:
BE Bloom Energy Corporation (~283.36) HIGH RISK

⇗ Top

Price: $283.36 | Entry Zone: $200–220

Technicals

  • Price has gone parabolic, breaking significantly above the upper boundary of the long-term ascending diagonal channel.
  • RSI is currently overbought at 73.88, suggesting the move is overextended in the short term.
  • The stock is trading far above its previous 'Buy' signal near $140, indicating a high risk of mean reversion.
  • Trend structure is extremely vertical, which typically precedes a sharp correction or consolidation period.

News & Financials

  • Price has gone parabolic, breaking significantly above the upper boundary of the long-term ascending diagonal channel.
  • RSI is currently overbought at 73.88, suggesting the move is overextended in the short term.
  • The stock is trading far above its previous 'Buy' signal near $140, indicating a high risk of mean reversion.
  • Trend structure is extremely vertical, which typically precedes a sharp correction or consolidation period.

Assessment

  • Buy level: Wait for a retest of the upper diagonal trendline near $210 or a significant RSI cooling period.
  • Risk: Extreme downside risk due to the parabolic nature of the current move; high probability of a sharp pullback to the channel support.
  • Action: Given the current 1.1% allocation and the extreme overbought conditions, recommend trimming the position by 50% (~7.5 shares) to lock in profits while holding the remainder to capture potential further momentum.
action: Given the current 1.1% allocation and the extreme overbought conditions, recommend trimming the position by 50% (~7.5 shares) to lock in profits while holding the remainder to capture potential further momentum.

html:
CAKE The Cheesecake Factory Incorporated (~62.87) NOT YET

⇗ Top

Price: $62.87 | Entry Zone: $56.00–58.00

Technicals

  • Price is currently testing a major resistance zone near the $64-$66 range.
  • A 'Sell' signal has recently appeared on the daily chart at current price levels.
  • The RSI/Oscillator is in overbought territory (above 70), indicating a potential short-term peak.
  • Price is significantly extended above the primary long-term diagonal support trendline.

News & Financials

  • Price is currently testing a major resistance zone near the $64-$66 range.
  • A 'Sell' signal has recently appeared on the daily chart at current price levels.
  • The RSI/Oscillator is in overbought territory (above 70), indicating a potential short-term peak.
  • Price is significantly extended above the primary long-term diagonal support trendline.

Assessment

  • Buy level: Wait for a retracement to the $56-$58 support level or a successful retest of the long-term trendline.
  • Risk: High risk of entering at a local top; potential for a 10% correction to find meaningful support.
  • Action: Maintain 0.0% allocation for now. Do not open a position at current levels due to overbought conditions and the active sell signal. Look to initiate a starter position (1-2%, ~62.5-125.0 shares) only if the price pulls back into the $56-$58 entry zone.

html:
CEG Constellation Energy Corporation (~313.00) WAIT

⇗ Top

Price: $313.00 | Entry Zone: $285–300

Technicals

  • RSI purple line has crossed above the orange signal line, indicating increasing bullish momentum.
  • Price has successfully broken out of a medium-term diagonal downtrend.
  • A recent 'Buy' signal was triggered near the $280 level, followed by a strong recovery toward $313.
  • Price is currently approaching a local resistance level near $320.

News & Financials

  • RSI purple line has crossed above the orange signal line, indicating increasing bullish momentum.
  • Price has successfully broken out of a medium-term diagonal downtrend.
  • A recent 'Buy' signal was triggered near the $280 level, followed by a strong recovery toward $313.
  • Price is currently approaching a local resistance level near $320.

Assessment

  • Buy level: Look for a pullback to the $290-$300 support zone or a daily close above $320 with volume.
  • Risk: Potential for a short-term rejection at the $320 resistance level, which could lead to a retest of the $260-$270 support floor.
  • Action: Hold the current 1.0% position (12.0 shares). Do not add at current resistance. Wait for a pullback to the $285-$300 entry zone to add a second starter position of 1% (~12.6 shares) to bring the total allocation to 2%.
